title: astragalus yangii
intro: Astragalus yangii, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus yangii include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and blood sugar levels. Astragalus yangii is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in capsule or tincture form to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defense mechanisms.
